name: genie-by-zyra
description: Zyra's internal AI devotional film studio.

scripts.test:security: node scripts/security-check.mjs && node scripts/test-secret-patterns.mjs && node scripts/test-server-secret-inventory.mjs && node scripts/test-precheckpoint-gate-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-gitleaks-ignore.mjs
scripts.test:rls: node scripts/check-rls-baseline.mjs && node scripts/test-rls-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-phase2-database-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-phase2-database-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-phase2-preflight-provider-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-phase2-preflight-provider-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-database-harness-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-pgtap-harness-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-direct-database-result.mjs && node scripts/test-live-candidate-evidence.mjs && node scripts/test-phase1-forward-rollback-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-private-runtime-path.mjs && node scripts/test-trusted-live-branch-control.mjs && node scripts/test-live-branch-reaper.mjs && node scripts/test-live-broker-signing.mjs && node scripts/test-remote-live-broker.mjs && pnpm test:live-trusted-harness && node scripts/test-live-sandbox-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-isolated-next-runner-policy.mjs && node scripts/run-live-database-tests.mjs
scripts.test:acceptance:structure: node scripts/generate-traceability-plan.mjs && node scripts/test-traceability-generator.mjs && node scripts/test-traceability-checkpoint.mjs && pnpm test:phase2:evidence-policy && git diff --exit-code -- reference/acceptance/traceability-plan.v1.json
scripts.test:acceptance: pnpm test:acceptance:structure && node scripts/assert-traceability-checkpoint.mjs phase0 && node scripts/assert-traceability-checkpoint.mjs phase1
scripts.test:phase0: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:rls && pnpm test:browser && pnpm build:canary && pnpm test:bundle && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:production-env && pnpm test:production
scripts.precheckpoint-gates:raw: pnpm format:check && pnpm test:acceptance:structure && pnpm test:phase2:generation && pnpm test:secretless && pnpm scan:dependencies && pnpm scan:licenses && pnpm generate:sbom && node scripts/run-frozen-live-suite.mjs --snapshot-smoke && pnpm test:phase0
